title: canarium hirsutum
intro: Canarium hirsutum, also known as the bushy canarium or hairy canarium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Canarium hirsutum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve cough and cold symptoms, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
